name: Remote: Suspicious Amount of IM/Chat Traffic
notes: This rule triggers when an excessive amount of IM/Chat traffic from a single source is detected.
bb_references: BB:Policy Violation: IRC IM Policy Violation: IM Communications
BB:Policy Violation: IRC IM Policy Violation: IM Communications match at least 20 times in 1 hour(s)
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Local
when a flow matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
when BB:Policy Violation: IRC IM Policy Violation: IM Communications match at least 20 times in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when BB:Policy Violation: IRC IM Policy Violation: IM Communications match at least 20 times in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY Remote: Suspicious Amount of IM/Chat Traffic on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the flow context is Local to Local
AND when a flow matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
AND when BB:Policy Violation: IRC IM Policy Violation: IM Communications match at least 20 times in 1 hour(s)
RED_list: Event description: Detects an excessive amount of IM/Chat traffic from a single source.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
